title: Pauli Gates: X, Y, Z in Depth
description: Master the three Pauli gates - the fundamental building blocks of quantum computation. Understand their mathematical properties, physical interpretations, and applications.
learningObjectives: Understand the mathematical structure of Pauli matrices
Apply Pauli gates to arbitrary quantum states
Visualize Pauli operations on the Bloch sphere
Master Pauli algebra and commutation relations
Use Pauli gates in quantum circuits
